body: ## [1.11.3](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.11.2...v1.11.3) (2017-03-22) ### Bug Fixes * **Slider:** display disabled slider when `min === max` (#2041) ([511fdfd](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/511fdfd)), closes [#2037](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2037)
